channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: En promo, quelle est la meilleure affaire entre le nouveau Samsung Galaxy A27 et le Xiaomi Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G ?
item.description: Faut-il craquer pour le tout récent Samsung Galaxy A27 ou miser sur la fiche technique généreuse du Xiaomi Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G ? Ces deux smartphones milieu de gamme profitent d’une belle promotion. Pour moins de 350 euros, lequel sera le compagnon idéal ?

item.title: Ukraine reveals secret strike squadron of civilian planes transformed into deadly reusable drone bombers that can drop 100Kg bombs 1200 miles deep inside Russia
item.description: Ukraine revealed reusable Horynych bomber drones converted from civilian aircraft following a reported strike against Russian military infrastructure near Crimea.

item.title: Chinese solar company says its new cell has an efficiency of 35.5 percent
item.description: Chinese company LONGi has developed crystalline silicon-perovskite tandem solar cells with a 35.5 percent conversion efficiency.

item.title: Marvel's X-Men movie: cast rumors and everything we know so far about MCU's new mutant-starring comic book film
item.description: Here's everything we know so far about the Marvel Cinematic Universe's first X-Men movie.

item.title: Polling rates explained: do you really need 8,000Hz for keyboards and mice in 2026?
item.description: TechRadar investigates whether you really need an 8,000Hz polling rate for your gaming keyboard or mouse, looks at the pros/cons, professional players, and gives a definitive verdict.

item.title: Sony’s flagship RGB LED TV is incredible
item.description: The Sony Bravia 9 II is the most anticipated new TV in years. It's an amazing RGB LED TV. I watched Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves on the new Bravia with my son, who has been getting into the roleplaying game but had never seen the movie. The landscapes of Faerûn looked natural and […]

item.title: How to watch South Africa vs Wales for FREE: Live streams, TV channels, team news for Nations Championship 2026
item.description: All the ways to watch South Africa vs Wales live streams – including for FREE – for the Nations Championship 2026 Round 3 game at Kings Park Stadium.

item.title: En 2 ans, votre voiture électrique est déjà obsolète : le chiffre fou qui vient de Chine
item.description: La puissance de frappe des constructeurs chinois a de quoi faire peur. Leurs gammes se renouvellent si vite que la voiture électrique chinoise moyenne en circulation n’a que deux ans ! C’est certainement moins que le smartphone que vous tenez en mains…

item.title: On a testé la Xiaomi Electric Scooter 6 Max : une trottinette électrique très équilibrée et performante
item.description: Derrière son allure classique, l’Electric Scooter 6 Max est l’une des trottinettes électriques les plus réussies du marché, avec de belles performances, un superbe écran, une excellente stabilité, mais elle rate de peu la perfection à cause du freinage… Nous l'avons testée, voici notre verdict.

item.title: More games should be on rails (literally)
item.description: It's been a good few weeks for games on rails. Nintendo's Star Fox remake wisely kept the tightly scripted, action-packed levels from Star Fox 64 largely the same, and they're still fun to fly through nearly 20 years later. Denshattack!, a new game from Undercoders, similarly features levels packed with carefully orchestrated sequences to great […]

item.title: The apps, gadgets, and tools every reader needs
item.description: Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 136, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, hope your neighborhood isn't as smoky as mine, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) This week, I've been recording the next season of Version History […]

item.title: 'It almost defied belief': here are the 5 best OnePlus phones ever, as the 'flagship killer' leaves the US and Europe
item.description: We're not going to get any more new OnePlus phones in the US and Europe, but we still have our memories.

item.title: AI-run 'utopias,' Moss in 2D and other new indie games worth checking out
item.description: Enjoy our weekend guide to the best indie games worth checking out.
